tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Should.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Should का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: You should drink more water. We should arrive on time. He should see a doctor. You should not lie. We should work hard.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Should.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Should का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She should apologize. You should take care of your health. Should I do this? We should help others. You should sleep early.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "उसे सच बताना चाहिए।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "You shoulds not lie."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Should.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Should का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: You should practice more. Should we buy this? He should not smoke. You should listen to your parents.
